How to earn daily LP rewards on @Polymarket.

It feels like there's strong interest for market-making (providing liquidity) on Polymarket, but many still don't know how to get started. 

Here's all you need to do:

> Click the "Rewards" tab in the upper right drop down
> Filter by reward size and browse markets
> When you find a market you like, click it's bar to reveal a drop down of the orderbook
> Hover over the "Rewards" button in purple to view spread and shares needed to earn rewards
> Place limit order (bid) in the range
> A blue circle will appear around your bid in the orderbook
> Done

Now you're earning LP rewards!

Please be careful. Observe first. Choose markets you understand. Start small. Ask around for tips. 

Continuous, deep liquidity across markets is what makes Polymarket thrive. By providing liquidity, you're helping the product succeed. 

If this is helpful please let me know, and I'll share more tips.
